subcodes.first_line: O phoenix, set ablaze with the fire of the love of God, and enkindled by the flame that burned in the Blessed Tree upon the lofty Mount [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای سمندر مشتعل بنار محبت الله و متوقد بنار موقده در شجره مبارکه در اعلی الطور
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @love of God
